'''''Pizzazz'' 13''' is the thirteenth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[October]] [[1978]] and featured the continuation of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Kingdom of Ice]]''.<ref name="Issue 13" />

The article "Test Driving the Great Spaceships" discusses science fiction movie spaceships, including the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing fighters]] and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. It is written in the words of a "used spaceship salesman."<ref name="Issue 13" />
